subtasks.description: Generate SQL query to extract AWS contracted commit levels and actual spend by service/account/period. Join contract terms with spend data, calculate variance (committed vs actual), and identify overcommitment (actual < committed) and underutilization (actual significantly below committed) scenarios.

Reconcile contract commitments with spend data to classify commitment posture (overcommitted, optimally committed, undercommitted, underutilized). Generate recommendations for commitment adjustments (increase/decrease reserved instances, negotiate term changes) based on variance patterns and forecast trends.

plan.cost_rationale: Two subtasks: SQL query generation is mid-tier (multi-table join of contract and spend data with variance calculations and classification logic). Cross-recon is mid-tier (reconciliation of two data sources—contracts vs spend—with posture classification and recommendation generation). No separate policy_action needed as the query does not ask for governance approval or policy compliance checking, only financial analysis and optimization recommendations. This is minimal decomposition: the SQL handles all data extraction and variance computation in one call; cross_recon handles all downstream reconciliation, classification, and recommendation logic in one call.

output.sql: WITH aws_commits AS (SELECT contract_id, vendor_name, SUM(amount_usd) AS committed_amount FROM invoice_facts WHERE vendor_name ILIKE '%aws%' OR vendor_name ILIKE '%amazon%' GROUP BY contract_id, vendor_name), aws_actuals AS (SELECT publisher, product, fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter, SUM(amount_usd) AS actual_spend FROM consumption_facts WHERE publisher ILIKE '%aws%' OR publisher ILIKE '%amazon%' GROUP BY publisher, product, fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter) SELECT c.contract_id, c.vendor_name, a.product, a.fiscal_year, a.fiscal_quarter, c.committed_amount, a.actual_spend, (a.actual_spend - c.committed_amount) AS variance_usd, CASE WHEN a.actual_spend > c.committed_amount THEN 'OVERCOMMITMENT' WHEN a.actual_spend < (c.committed_amount * 0.7) THEN 'UNDERUTILIZATION' ELSE 'ON_TARGET' END AS status FROM aws_commits c CROSS JOIN aws_actuals a ORDER BY variance_usd DESC

reconciled.sql_value: AWS commitment vs actual spend comparison query generated
